query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS candidateApplications (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  firstName VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL,
  lastName VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL,
  email VARCHAR(320) NOT NULL,
  phone VARCHAR(50),
  dateOfBirth DATE NOT NULL,
  city VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL,
  country VARCHAR(100) DEFAULT 'Belgique' NOT NULL,
  profilePhoto TEXT,
  galleryPhotos TEXT,
  videoPresentation TEXT,
  bio TEXT,
  instagram VARCHAR(100),
  facebook VARCHAR(100),
  tiktok VARCHAR(100),
  status ENUM('pending', 'approved', 'rejected') DEFAULT 'pending' NOT NULL,
  rejectionReason TEXT,
  acceptedTerms INT DEFAULT 0 NOT NULL,
  contestId INT NOT NULL,
  approvedBy INT,
  approvedAt TIMESTAMP NULL,
  candidateId INT,
  createdAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  updatedAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  INDEX candidateApplications_email_idx (email),
  INDEX candidateApplications_status_idx (status),
  INDEX candidateApplications_contest_idx (contestId)
);

  instagram VARCHAR(100),
  facebook VARCHAR(100),
  tiktok VARCHAR(100),
  status ENUM('pending', 'approved', 'rejected') DEFAULT 'pending' NOT NULL,
  rejectionReason TEXT,
  acceptedTerms INT DEFAULT 0 NOT NULL,
  contestId INT NOT NULL,
  approvedBy INT,
  approvedAt TIMESTAMP NULL,
  candidateId INT,
  createdAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  updatedAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  INDEX candidateApplications_email_idx (email),
  INDEX candidateApplications_status_idx (status),
  INDEX candidateApplications_contest_idx (contestId)
);
